{"headword":"bull","explanation":"指「公牛」。在文化、農業或動物相關的語境中可能出現。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bull","explanation":"指「公牛」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The farmer carefully led the powerful <bull> back *to* its pen after it had grazed *in* the pasture all morning.","translation":"農夫小心翼翼地將那頭強壯的公牛牽回牛欄，牠已經在牧場吃草一整個上午了。"}]}],"related_forms":["bulls (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"bullet","explanation":"指「子彈」。在歷史、社會議題或新聞報導中可能出現。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bullet","explanation":"指「子彈」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Forensic experts examined the <bullet> recovered *from* the crime scene to identify the type of weapon used.","translation":"鑑識專家檢查了從犯罪現場找到的子彈，以辨識所使用的武器類型。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"bullet point","explanation":"指「項目符號」，常用於列點說明。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"During the presentation, the speaker used clear <bullet points> *to* summarize the main ideas, making the information easy *to* follow.","translation":"在簡報中，演講者使用清晰的項目符號來總結主要觀點，使資訊易於理解。"}]}],"related_forms":["bullets (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"bump","explanation":"這個字可作名詞或動詞，名詞指「碰撞」或「隆起」，動詞指「碰撞」或「撞到」。常考介係詞搭配。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bump","explanation":"作名詞時，指「碰撞」或「隆起物」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The car hit a large <bump> *in* the road, causing the passengers to jolt forward unexpectedly.","translation":"汽車撞到路上的大顛簸，導致乘客意外地向前猛衝。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"bump","explanation":"作動詞時，指「撞到」或「碰撞」。常與介係詞 into 或 against 搭配。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"I accidentally <bumped> *into* an old friend at the supermarket, which was a pleasant surprise.","translation":"我在超市意外地撞見一位老朋友，這是一個令人愉快的驚喜。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"bump into","explanation":"片語動詞，意為「偶然遇見」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"While studying abroad, I was surprised to <bump> *into* my former high school teacher at a local cafe.","translation":"在國外留學時，我很驚訝地在當地咖啡館偶然遇見了我以前的高中老師。"}]}],"related_forms":["bumps","bumped","bumping"]}

{"headword":"bunch","explanation":"這個字作名詞，指「一束」、「一串」或「一群」。常用於描述數量。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bunch","explanation":"指「一束」、「一串」或「一群」。常用於水果、花朵或人。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"She bought a <bunch> *of* grapes and a bouquet of flowers for her mother's birthday celebration.","translation":"她為媽媽的生日慶祝活動買了一串葡萄和一束花。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"a bunch of","explanation":"片語，意為「許多」、「大量」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"After the exam, a <bunch> *of* students gathered outside the classroom to discuss the difficult questions.","translation":"考試結束後，一群學生聚集在教室外討論那些難題。"}]}],"related_forms":["bunches"]}

{"headword":"bundle","explanation":"這個字作名詞，指「一捆」、「一束」或「包裹」。常用於描述被綁在一起的物品。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bundle","explanation":"指「一捆」、「一束」或「包裹」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The delivery person left a large <bundle> *of* newspapers and magazines at the front door this morning.","translation":"送貨員今天早上在門口留下了一大捆報紙和雜誌。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"a bundle of","explanation":"片語，意為「一捆...」、「一束...」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"To keep warm in the cold weather, she wrapped herself *in* a <bundle> *of* blankets before going to sleep.","translation":"為了在寒冷的天氣中保暖，她在睡覺前用一堆毯子把自己裹起來。"}]}],"related_forms":["bundles"]}

{"headword":"bury","explanation":"這個字作動詞，指「埋葬」或「埋藏」。常用於描述將某物放入地下。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bury","explanation":"指「埋葬」或「埋藏」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The ancient civilization used to <bury> their dead with valuable possessions, believing in an afterlife.","translation":"古代文明習慣將死者與貴重物品一起埋葬，相信有來生。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"bury oneself in","explanation":"片語動詞，意為「埋首於...」、「專心於...」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"To escape from her worries, she decided to <bury> herself *in* her studies and focus on her academic goals.","translation":"為了擺脫煩惱，她決定埋首於學業，專注於她的學術目標。"}]}],"related_forms":["buried","burying","burial"]}

{"headword":"bush","explanation":"這個字作名詞，指「灌木」或「矮樹叢」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bush","explanation":"指「灌木」或「矮樹叢」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The small bird built its nest carefully *among* the thick leaves *of* the <bush> in the garden.","translation":"小鳥小心翼翼地在花園灌木叢茂密的葉子中築巢。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"beat around the bush","explanation":"俚語，意為「拐彎抹角」、「旁敲側擊」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Instead of beating *around* the <bush>, please tell me directly what you want to say about the project.","translation":"請不要拐彎抹角，直接告訴我你對這個專案想說什麼。"}]}],"related_forms":["bushes"]}

{"headword":"buzz","explanation":"這個字可作名詞或動詞，指「嗡嗡聲」或「發出嗡嗡聲」，也常指「熱議」或「忙碌的氣氛」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"buzz","explanation":"名詞，指「嗡嗡聲」或「熱議」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The sudden <buzz> *of* the alarm clock woke me up, signaling it was time to prepare for the important exam.","translation":"鬧鐘突然的嗡嗡聲把我吵醒，表示是時候準備重要的考試了。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"buzz","explanation":"動詞，指「發出嗡嗡聲」或「熱議、傳開」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The news *about* the new school policy began to <buzz> *around* the campus, causing much discussion among students.","translation":"關於新校園政策的消息開始在校園裡傳開，引起學生們的熱烈討論。"}]}],"related_forms":["buzzing","buzzed"]}

{"headword":"cabin","explanation":"這個字指「小木屋」、「船艙」或「機艙」，在閱讀測驗中常出現。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cabin","explanation":"名詞，指「小木屋」、「船艙」或「機艙」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"During the flight, passengers were asked to remain *in* their <cabin> seats and fasten their seatbelts for safety.","translation":"飛行期間，乘客被要求留在機艙座位上並繫好安全帶以確保安全。"},{"marked_sentence":"We rented a cozy <cabin> *in* the mountains for our winter vacation, enjoying the peaceful natural surroundings.","translation":"我們在山裡租了一間舒適的小木屋度過寒假，享受寧靜的自然環境。"}]}],"related_forms":["cabins"]}

{"headword":"cable","explanation":"這個字可作名詞或動詞，指「纜線」或「發電報」，在科技或通訊相關的文章中很常見。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cable","explanation":"名詞，指「纜線」或「電纜」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The internet connection was restored after technicians repaired the damaged fiber optic <cable> *under* the street.","translation":"技術人員修復了街道下損壞的光纖電纜後，網路連線恢復了。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cable","explanation":"動詞，指「發電報」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Before the age *of* email, people would <cable> important messages *to* their relatives overseas.","translation":"在電子郵件時代之前，人們會向海外的親戚發送重要的電報。"}]}],"related_forms":["cables","cabled"]}

{"headword":"cafeteria","explanation":"這個字指「自助餐廳」，通常在學校、醫院或公司內提供餐飲服務。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cafeteria","explanation":"名詞，指「自助餐廳」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Students often gather *in* the school <cafeteria> *for* lunch, enjoying a variety of affordable and delicious meals.","translation":"學生們經常在學校自助餐廳吃午餐，享用各種價格實惠又美味的餐點。"}]}],"related_forms":["cafeterias"]}

{"headword":"campus","explanation":"這個字指「校園」，在描述學校生活或大學環境時經常使用。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"campus","explanation":"名詞，指「校園」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The university <campus> is expanding, *with* new dormitories and research facilities being built to accommodate more students.","translation":"這所大學的校園正在擴建，新的宿舍和研究設施正在興建中，以容納更多學生。"}]}],"related_forms":["campuses"]}

{"headword":"canyon","explanation":"這個字是名詞，指「峽谷」，常在地理或自然科學文章中出現。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"canyon","explanation":"指由河流侵蝕形成的深谷。在閱讀測驗中，常與地理景觀相關。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The Grand <Canyon> in Arizona, carved by the Colorado River, is a breathtaking natural wonder attracting millions of tourists annually.","translation":"亞利桑那州的大峽谷，由科羅拉多河雕刻而成，是一個每年吸引數百萬遊客的令人驚嘆的自然奇觀。"}]}],"related_forms":[]}

{"headword":"capable","explanation":"這個字是形容詞，意為「有能力的」，常與介係詞 *of* 搭配，形成片語 *be capable of*。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"capable","explanation":"指某人或某物有能力做某事，後面常接 *of* V-ing。在寫作或克漏字中，介係詞的搭配是重點。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Despite his young age, the student proved himself <capable> *of* solving complex mathematical problems with minimal assistance.","translation":"儘管年紀輕輕，這位學生證明自己有能力在最少的協助下解決複雜的數學問題。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"be capable of","explanation":"固定片語，意為「有能力做...」。此片語後方通常接動名詞 (V-ing)。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Modern artificial intelligence systems are becoming increasingly <capable> *of* performing tasks that once required human intelligence.","translation":"現代人工智慧系統越來越有能力執行過去需要人類智慧才能完成的任務。"}]}],"related_forms":["capability (n.)","capably (adv.)"]}

{"headword":"captain","explanation":"這個字是名詞，指「船長」、「機長」或「隊長」。在閱讀測驗中，常出現在描述領導人物的語境。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"captain","explanation":"指船隻、飛機或運動隊伍的領導者。在運動情境中，隊長的角色很重要。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The experienced <captain> safely navigated the ship through the stormy seas, ensuring the crew's and passengers' well-being.","translation":"經驗豐富的船長安全地駕駛船隻穿越暴風雨的海域，確保了船員和乘客的安康。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"team captain","explanation":"指運動隊伍的隊長，負責領導和激勵隊員。此用法在校園或運動相關主題中常見。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"As the <team captain>, she motivated her teammates to work together, leading them to victory in the national basketball championship.","translation":"作為隊長，她激勵隊友們團結合作，帶領他們贏得了全國籃球錦標賽的冠軍。"}]}],"related_forms":[]}

{"headword":"capture","explanation":"這個字可作動詞或名詞。動詞意為「捕獲」、「佔領」或「捕捉（影像、注意力）」，名詞意為「捕獲」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"capture (v.)","explanation":"作動詞，指「捕獲」、「佔領」或「捕捉（影像、注意力）」。在閱讀測驗中，可能指實際的捕捉或抽象的捕捉。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The wildlife photographer managed to <capture> a rare moment of a leopard hunting its prey in the dense jungle.","translation":"這位野生動物攝影師成功捕捉到了一隻豹在茂密叢林中捕食獵物的罕見瞬間。"},{"marked_sentence":"The police successfully <capture> the escaped suspect after a long chase through the city's narrow streets.","translation":"經過在城市狹窄街道上的長時間追捕，警方成功逮捕了逃脫的嫌犯。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"capture (n.)","explanation":"作名詞，指「捕獲」或「佔領」。此用法相對較少，但仍需注意。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The <capture> of the enemy fortress marked a significant turning point in the ancient battle, leading to the war's end.","translation":"敵方堡壘的佔領標誌著這場古老戰役的一個重要轉折點，導致了戰爭的結束。"}]}],"related_forms":["captured (v. past tense/p.p.)","capturing (v. present participle)"]}

{"headword":"career","explanation":"這個字是名詞，指「職業生涯」或「事業」。在生涯規劃或社會議題的閱讀文章中很常見。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"career","explanation":"指一個人一生中從事的工作或職業發展歷程。在討論未來規劃時，這個字是核心。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Many students are now considering a <career> in environmental science, hoping to contribute to sustainable development.","translation":"許多學生現在正考慮從事環境科學的職業，希望能為永續發展做出貢獻。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"career path","explanation":"指個人在職業生涯中的發展方向或道路。這個片語在討論職涯選擇時非常實用。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Choosing a suitable <career path> is crucial for young graduates, as it significantly impacts their future professional growth.","translation":"選擇一條合適的職業道路對年輕畢業生至關重要，因為它會顯著影響他們未來的專業成長。"}]}],"related_forms":[]}

{"headword":"bacon","explanation":"培根是不可數名詞，通常指豬肉製成的煙燻肉片。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"bacon","explanation":"指「培根」，通常作為早餐食物。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"For breakfast, many people enjoy crispy <bacon> served *with* eggs and toast, a classic combination.","translation":"早餐時，許多人喜歡吃酥脆的培根搭配雞蛋和吐司，這是一種經典組合。"}]}],"related_forms":[]}

{"headword":"carpenter","explanation":"指「木匠」，是從事木工的人。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"carpenter","explanation":"指「木匠、木工」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The skilled <carpenter> carefully measured and cut the wood to build a beautiful custom bookshelf for the client.","translation":"這位技術熟練的木匠仔細測量並切割木材，為客戶製作了一個漂亮的訂製書架。"}]}],"related_forms":["carpentry (n.)"]}

{"headword":"carpet","explanation":"這個字可作名詞「地毯」，也可作動詞「鋪地毯」或「嚴厲斥責」。動詞用法較少見，但「嚴厲斥責」的用法值得注意。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"carpet (n.)","explanation":"指「地毯」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The new office building features soft, plush <carpet> in all the common areas, making the space feel more inviting.","translation":"這棟新辦公大樓的所有公共區域都鋪設了柔軟舒適的地毯，讓空間感覺更溫馨。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"carpet (v.)","explanation":"作動詞時，意為「鋪地毯」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The workers will <carpet> the entire second floor of the hotel next week, ensuring a fresh look for guests.","translation":"工人下週將會為飯店的整個二樓鋪設地毯，確保給客人一個全新的面貌。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"be carpeted *with* (v.)","explanation":"指「被...覆蓋」，常用於描述地面被某物（如花朵、雪等）覆蓋。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"In spring, the meadow *is* <carpeted> *with* wildflowers, creating a breathtaking view for hikers.","translation":"春天時，草地被野花覆蓋，為徒步旅行者創造了令人驚嘆的景色。"}]}],"related_forms":["carpeting (n.)"]}

{"headword":"carriage","explanation":"指「馬車」、「嬰兒車」或火車的「車廂」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"carriage","explanation":"指「馬車」、「嬰兒車」或火車的「車廂」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The royal family arrived at the event in a magnificent horse-drawn <carriage>, drawing cheers from the crowd.","translation":"皇室成員乘坐華麗的馬車抵達活動現場，引來人群的歡呼。"}]}],"related_forms":[]}

{"headword":"cart","explanation":"這個字可作名詞「手推車」，也可作動詞「用手推車運送」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cart (n.)","explanation":"指「手推車」、「購物車」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"She loaded all her groceries into the shopping <cart> and pushed it towards the checkout counter.","translation":"她把所有雜貨都裝進購物車，然後推向結帳櫃檯。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cart (v.)","explanation":"作動詞時，意為「用手推車運送」或「艱難地搬運」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The movers had to <cart> heavy boxes *up* three flights of stairs, which was quite a strenuous task.","translation":"搬家工人必須將沉重的箱子搬上三層樓梯，這是一項相當費力的工作。"}]}],"related_forms":["cartage (n.)"]}

{"headword":"cast","explanation":"這個字動詞和名詞同形，動詞常考「投擲」、「選角」、「投射（光影）」等意思，名詞則指「演員陣容」或「石膏繃帶」。介係詞搭配和片語是重點。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cast (v.)","explanation":"作動詞時，指「投擲、丟」。其三態為 cast-cast-cast。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The fisherman <cast> his net into the deep blue sea, hoping to catch a good amount of fish for dinner.","translation":"漁夫將網撒入深藍的大海中，希望能捕到足夠的魚作為晚餐。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cast (as in select actors)","explanation":"指「為戲劇或電影選角」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The director decided to <cast> a relatively unknown actress for the lead role, believing she had raw talent.","translation":"導演決定為主角選一位相對不知名的女演員，相信她擁有天賦。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cast (as in project light/shadow)","explanation":"指「投射（光線、陰影、視線等）」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The tall buildings <cast> long shadows across the city streets as the sun began to set in the west.","translation":"隨著太陽從西方落下，高樓大廈在城市街道上投下長長的陰影。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cast (as in actors)","explanation":"作名詞時，指「（戲劇或電影的）演員陣容」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The entire <cast> of the play received a standing ovation for their outstanding performance on opening night.","translation":"該劇的全體演員陣容在首演之夜因其出色的表現而獲得了起立鼓掌。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cast (as in medical cast)","explanation":"指「石膏繃帶」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"After breaking his arm, the boy had to wear a plaster <cast> for six weeks before it could fully heal.","translation":"摔斷手臂後，男孩必須打石膏繃帶六週才能完全康復。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cast a vote","explanation":"意為「投票」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Citizens have the right to <cast> a vote in the upcoming election to choose their preferred political leaders.","translation":"公民有權在即將到來的選舉中投票，選出他們偏好的政治領袖。"}]}],"related_forms":["casting (n.)"]}

{"headword":"casual","explanation":"這個字主要指「非正式的」、「隨意的」，常考其反義詞 formal 或與其他名詞搭配的片語。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"casual","explanation":"指「非正式的、隨意的」，常用於服裝、態度或場合。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"For the picnic, guests were encouraged to wear <casual> clothes rather than formal attire to feel more comfortable.","translation":"野餐時，鼓勵客人穿著休閒服裝而非正式服飾，以便感覺更舒適。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"casual acquaintance","explanation":"指「泛泛之交」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"He wasn't a close friend, just a <casual> acquaintance whom he occasionally met at social gatherings.","translation":"他不是親密的朋友，只是一個他在社交聚會上偶爾遇到的泛泛之交。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"casual conversation","explanation":"指「閒聊」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"During a <casual> conversation at the party, I learned that my new colleague also enjoys hiking.","translation":"在派對上的閒聊中，我得知我的新同事也喜歡健行。"}]}],"related_forms":["casually (adv.)","casualness (n.)"]}

{"headword":"cattle","explanation":"這個字是集合名詞，指「牛隻」，本身就是複數，不可加 s。常考與其他動物相關的詞彙辨析。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cattle","explanation":"指「牛隻」，是集合名詞，本身即為複數，不可加 s。動詞須用複數形式。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The farmer led his <cattle> to the green pasture, where they could graze freely on the fresh grass.","translation":"農夫將他的牛隻帶到綠色的牧場，在那裡牠們可以自由地吃新鮮的草。"}]}],"related_forms":["cow (n., sing.)","ox (n., sing.)"]}

{"headword":"cave","explanation":"這個字名詞指「洞穴」，動詞則常與介係詞 in 搭配，表示「坍塌、屈服」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cave (n.)","explanation":"作名詞時，指「洞穴」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Explorers discovered an ancient <cave> system deep within the mountains, filled with unique rock formations.","translation":"探險家們在山脈深處發現了一個古老的洞穴系統，裡面充滿了獨特的岩石構造。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cave in","explanation":"作動詞片語時，指「坍塌、塌陷」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Due to the heavy rain, part of the old mine tunnel <caved> *in*, trapping several workers inside.","translation":"由於大雨，舊礦坑隧道的一部分坍塌了，困住了幾名工人。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cave in to","explanation":"指「屈服於、讓步於（壓力或要求）」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Despite initial resistance, the government eventually <caved> *in* *to* public pressure and withdrew the controversial policy.","translation":"儘管最初抵抗，政府最終還是屈服於公眾壓力，撤回了有爭議的政策。"}]}],"related_forms":["cavern (n.)"]}

{"headword":"champion","explanation":"這個字名詞指「冠軍」或「擁護者」，動詞則指「擁護、支持」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"champion (as in winner)","explanation":"作名詞時，指「冠軍、優勝者」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The young athlete became the national swimming <champion> after an intense competition, breaking several records.","translation":"這位年輕的運動員在激烈的比賽後成為全國游泳冠軍，打破了數項紀錄。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"champion (as in supporter)","explanation":"指「（主義、事業等的）擁護者、鬥士」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"She was a strong <champion> *of* human rights, dedicating her life to fighting for equality and justice for all.","translation":"她是人權的堅定擁護者，一生致力於為所有人的平等和正義而奮鬥。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"champion (v.)","explanation":"作動詞時，指「擁護、支持（某項事業或原則）」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The senator continued to <champion> policies that would protect the environment, despite facing strong opposition.","translation":"儘管面臨強烈反對，這位參議員仍繼續擁護保護環境的政策。"}]}],"related_forms":["championship (n.)"]}

{"headword":"charm","explanation":"這個字可作名詞和動詞。作名詞時，指「魅力」或「護身符」；作動詞時，指「吸引」或「施展魅力」。常考其名詞用法，特別是形容詞的搭配。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"charm","explanation":"指「魅力」、「吸引力」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Her natural <charm> and witty humor always make her the center of attention at any social gathering.","translation":"她天生的魅力和機智的幽默感總是讓她在任何社交場合成為眾人矚目的焦點。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"charm (as in amulet)","explanation":"指「符咒」、「護身符」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Many people wear a lucky <charm> or amulet, believing it will protect them from harm and bring good fortune.","translation":"許多人佩戴幸運符或護身符，相信它能保護他們免受傷害並帶來好運。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"charm","explanation":"指「吸引」、「迷住」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The magician tried to <charm> the audience with his incredible card tricks and captivating stage presence.","translation":"魔術師試圖用他不可思議的撲克牌戲法和迷人的舞台魅力來吸引觀眾。"}]}],"related_forms":["charming","charmed"]}

{"headword":"chat","explanation":"這個字可作名詞和動詞，兩者都指「閒聊」。常考其動詞片語 chat with 或 chat about。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chat","explanation":"指「閒聊」、「聊天」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"We had a pleasant <chat> *about* our summer plans during the coffee break, sharing many interesting ideas.","translation":"我們在咖啡休息時間愉快地聊了聊暑假計畫，分享了許多有趣的點子。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chat","explanation":"指「閒聊」、「聊天」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Students often <chat> *with* their classmates online after school to discuss homework or simply relax.","translation":"學生們放學後經常在線上和同學閒聊，討論作業或只是放鬆。"}]}],"related_forms":["chatting","chatted"]}

{"headword":"cheek","explanation":"這個字作名詞，主要指「臉頰」。在口語中，也可用來指「厚臉皮」或「無禮」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cheek","explanation":"指「臉頰」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The baby's soft <cheeks> turned red when she giggled, making her look even more adorable.","translation":"當嬰兒咯咯笑時，她柔軟的臉頰變紅了，讓她看起來更加可愛。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"have the cheek to do sth","explanation":"口語用法，指「有膽量/厚臉皮做某事」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"He had the <cheek> *to* ask for a raise after consistently arriving late for work every day.","translation":"他每天上班都遲到，竟然還有臉要求加薪。"}]}],"related_forms":["cheeky"]}

{"headword":"cheerful","explanation":"這個字是形容詞，指「開朗的」、「愉快的」。常考其副詞 cheerfully 或名詞 cheerfulness。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cheerful","explanation":"指「開朗的」、「愉快的」、「令人心情愉快的」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Despite the challenges, she maintained a <cheerful> attitude, inspiring everyone around her with her positivity.","translation":"儘管面臨挑戰，她仍保持樂觀的態度，以她的積極性激勵著周圍的每一個人。"}]}],"related_forms":["cheerfully","cheerfulness","cheer"]}

{"headword":"cherry","explanation":"這個字作名詞時指「櫻桃」，作形容詞時指「櫻桃色的」。常見片語有 cherry-pick (精挑細選)。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cherry","explanation":"指「櫻桃」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The fresh <cherries> from the local farm were sweet and juicy, perfect for making a delicious pie.","translation":"來自當地農場的新鮮櫻桃又甜又多汁，非常適合做美味的派。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cherry (as in color)","explanation":"指「櫻桃色的」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"She painted her nails a bright <cherry> red, adding a vibrant touch to her elegant evening dress.","translation":"她把指甲塗成鮮豔的櫻桃紅色，為她優雅的晚禮服增添了一抹亮麗的色彩。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cherry-pick","explanation":"動詞片語，指「精挑細選」、「只挑選最好的」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The manager was criticized for trying to *cherry-pick* only the most promising candidates for the new project.","translation":"經理因試圖只為新專案精挑細選最有前途的候選人而受到批評。"}]}],"related_forms":["cherries"]}

{"headword":"chest","explanation":"這個字常考身體部位的「胸部」，也可指「箱子」或「櫃子」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chest","explanation":"指「胸部」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"After running the marathon, the athlete felt a sharp pain *in* his <chest>, indicating possible muscle strain.","translation":"跑完馬拉松後，這位運動員感到胸部一陣劇痛，顯示可能是肌肉拉傷。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chest","explanation":"指「箱子」或「櫃子」，例如 treasure chest (藏寶箱) 或 tool chest (工具箱)。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The old wooden <chest> *at* the attic contained many antique books and forgotten family heirlooms.","translation":"閣樓裡那個舊木箱裝有許多古董書和被遺忘的家族傳家寶。"}]}],"related_forms":["chests (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"chill","explanation":"作名詞時指「寒意」、「感冒」；作動詞時指「使變冷」、「使冷卻」；作形容詞時指「寒冷的」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chill (n.)","explanation":"指「寒意」或「寒冷」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"A sudden <chill> ran *down* my spine when I heard the eerie sound coming from the abandoned house.","translation":"當我聽到來自廢棄房屋的詭異聲音時，一陣寒意突然竄過我的脊椎。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"a chill (n.)","explanation":"指「感冒」或「著涼」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"He caught *a* <chill> after walking home *in* the rain without an umbrella, so he needed to rest.","translation":"他在雨中沒撐傘走回家後著涼了，所以他需要休息。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chill (v.)","explanation":"指「使變冷」、「使冷卻」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"To enjoy the lemonade more, it's best to <chill> it *in* the refrigerator for *at* least an hour before serving.","translation":"為了更好地享用檸檬水，最好在上桌前將其在冰箱中冷藏至少一小時。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chill out (v.)","explanation":"動詞片語，意為「放鬆」、「冷靜下來」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"After a stressful week of exams, all the students just wanted to <chill> *out* and enjoy their weekend.","translation":"經過一週緊張的考試後，所有學生都只想放鬆並享受他們的週末。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chill (adj.)","explanation":"形容詞，指「寒冷的」、「涼颼颼的」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The air *on* the mountain top was quite <chill>, even *in* the middle of summer, requiring a light jacket.","translation":"即使在盛夏時節，山頂的空氣也相當寒冷，需要一件薄外套。"}]}],"related_forms":["chilled (v. past/p.p.)","chilling (v. pres.p./adj.)"]}

{"headword":"chilly","explanation":"形容詞，指「寒冷的」、「涼颼颼的」。與 chill (adj.) 意思相近，但 chilly 更常用來形容天氣或環境帶有輕微的寒意。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chilly (adj.)","explanation":"指「寒冷的」、「涼颼颼的」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The weather turned unexpectedly <chilly> *in* the evening, so we decided to put *on* our jackets.","translation":"傍晚天氣出乎意料地變冷了，所以我們決定穿上夾克。"}]}],"related_forms":["chillier (comp.)","chilliest (sup.)"]}

{"headword":"chimney","explanation":"指「煙囪」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chimney","explanation":"指「煙囪」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Smoke was gently rising *from* the <chimney> of the small cottage, signaling that someone was home.","translation":"小木屋的煙囪裡冒出縷縷輕煙，預示著有人在家。"}]}],"related_forms":["chimneys (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"chin","explanation":"指「下巴」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chin","explanation":"指「下巴」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"He rested his <chin> *on* his hand, deep *in* thought, contemplating the difficult math problem.","translation":"他用手托著下巴，陷入沉思，思考著那道困難的數學題。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"keep one's chin up","explanation":"片語，意為「保持樂觀」、「不氣餒」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Despite facing many challenges, she always managed to *keep* her <chin> *up* and maintain a positive attitude.","translation":"儘管面臨許多挑戰，她總能保持樂觀，維持積極的態度。"}]}],"related_forms":["chins (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"chip","explanation":"作名詞時指「碎片」、「洋芋片」、「晶片」；作動詞時指「削下」、「弄碎」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chip (n.)","explanation":"指「碎片」、「碎屑」，常用於指木頭或石頭的碎屑。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"A small <chip> *of* paint fell *off* the old wall, revealing the original brick underneath.","translation":"一小片油漆從舊牆上剝落，露出了下面的原始磚塊。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chips (n. pl.)","explanation":"指「洋芋片」(美式英文) 或「炸薯條」(英式英文)。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"During the movie, we shared a bag of crispy potato <chips> and some refreshing soda.","translation":"看電影時，我們分享了一包酥脆的洋芋片和一些清爽的汽水。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chip (n.)","explanation":"指「積體電路晶片」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The new smartphone features an advanced processing <chip> that allows for incredibly fast performance.","translation":"這款新智慧型手機配備了先進的處理晶片，實現了令人難以置信的快速性能。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chip in (v.)","explanation":"動詞片語，意為「湊錢」、「出錢」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Everyone decided to <chip> *in* to buy a nice farewell gift for our beloved teacher.","translation":"大家決定湊錢為我們敬愛的老師買一份不錯的告別禮物。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chip away at (v.)","explanation":"動詞片語，意為「逐漸削弱」、「一點點地減少」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The constant criticism began to <chip> *away* *at* her confidence, making her doubt her abilities.","translation":"持續的批評開始逐漸削弱她的信心，讓她懷疑自己的能力。"}]}],"related_forms":["chipped (v. past/p.p.)","chipping (v. pres.p.)"]}

{"headword":"chop","explanation":"作名詞時指「排骨」、「切塊」；作動詞時指「砍」、「切」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"chop (v.)","explanation":"指「砍」、「切」，通常指用刀或斧頭快速而有力地切。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The chef carefully <chopped> the vegetables *into* small, even pieces for the stir-fry dish.","translation":"廚師小心翼翼地將蔬菜切成小而均勻的塊狀，用於這道快炒菜。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chop up (v.)","explanation":"動詞片語，意為「切碎」、「剁碎」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Please <chop> *up* the onions and garlic very finely before adding them to the soup.","translation":"請將洋蔥和大蒜切得非常碎，然後再加入湯中。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"chop (n.)","explanation":"指「排骨」，通常指豬排或羊排。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"For dinner tonight, I plan to grill some delicious pork <chops> served *with* mashed potatoes.","translation":"今晚晚餐，我打算烤一些美味的豬排，搭配馬鈴薯泥。"}]}],"related_forms":["chopped (v. past/p.p.)","chopping (v. pres.p.)"]}

{"headword":"cigarette","explanation":"指「香菸」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cigarette","explanation":"指「香菸」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Smoking a <cigarette> *in* public places is prohibited *by* law and carries a heavy fine.","translation":"在公共場所吸菸是法律禁止的，會被處以重罰。"}]}],"related_forms":["cigarettes (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"cinema","explanation":"指「電影院」或「電影業」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"cinema","explanation":"指「電影院」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"We decided to go *to* the <cinema> to watch the latest blockbuster movie *on* the big screen.","translation":"我們決定去電影院在大螢幕上看最新的賣座電影。"}]},{"word_or_collocation":"cinema","explanation":"指「電影業」或「電影藝術」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"Many students *at* the university are studying the history and theory *of* <cinema> as part of their arts degree.","translation":"大學裡許多學生正在學習電影的歷史和理論，作為他們藝術學位的一部分。"}]}],"related_forms":["cinemas (pl.)"]}

{"headword":"circus","explanation":"指「馬戲團」。","entries":[{"word_or_collocation":"circus","explanation":"指「馬戲團」。","sentences":[{"marked_sentence":"The children were thrilled to see the clowns and acrobats performing *at* the traveling <circus> *in* town.","translation":"孩子們看到小丑和雜技演員在鎮上的巡迴馬戲團表演時興奮不已。"}]}],"related_forms":["circuses (pl.)"]}
